title: `podman ps` displays container status "healthy" for unhealthy container
body:
Just caught while preparing for today's demo.

1. clone https://github.com/vrothberg/tutorials
2. run `PODMAN=$PODMAN_BINARY sh healthchecks/01-on-failure-actions.sh`

Cc: @mheon

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Ah, OK.  Got it.

`healthcheck run` returns what the current health check did but does not reflect the "status" as shown in `ps`.  Changing the `--health-retries` helped in the demo above.  Hence closing.
